---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement for the TestBench VS Code Extension
title: "[Enhancement] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Describe the Feature

Clearly describe the proposed feature or improvement.

## 🎯 Use Case / Problem It Solves

Explain the problem you're trying to solve or the workflow this feature would improve.

## 📝 Proposed Solution (Optional)

If you have a specific idea in mind for how the feature should work, describe it here.

## 📸 Mockups / Examples (Optional)

Attach any mockups, diagrams, screenshots, or usage examples that help illustrate your idea.

## 🔁 Additional Context

Add any other context, notes, or related ideas that might help us understand the request better.
